caption: The video depicts a panel discussion taking place in a modern, well-lit conference room. Three individuals are seated at individual tables with microphones, suggesting they are speakers or experts on a particular topic. The person on the left, dressed in a dark suit, appears to be addressing the audience or the other panelists, gesturing with their hands for emphasis. The woman in the center, wearing a black blazer and beige pants, is attentively listening and has her hands clasped together. On the right, another man in a patterned shirt stands with his arms crossed, also engaged in the conversation. Behind them, a large poster with text in Dutch and an image of hands interacting is visible, indicating the theme of the discussion might involve collaboration or interaction between science, practice, and healthcare needs. The setting includes rows of empty chairs facing the panel, suggesting the event is either not yet fully attended or is being recorded for later viewing.
